title: erythroxylum horridum
intro: Erythroxylum horridum, also known as the wild coca or horrid coca, is a plant species in the family Erythroxylaceae, native to South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erythroxylum horridum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, although its availability and use may vary depending on regional regulations and availability.
